commitMessage: Add user feedback for first person view feature

topics.title: First person snake view added to user feedback list
topics.trigger: A user requested the ability to see the game from the snake's own perspective, as if looking through its eyes.
topics.response: Added a new feedback entry to README3.md requesting a first person view from the snake's position.
topics.decisions: No design decisions were made in this session; the change is a verbatim transcription of a user's feature request into the feedback log.
